allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Women''s Day 2026 digital catalog

Single-page catalog for Altshuler Shaham with RTL page-flip navigation,
hamburger menu, touch/swipe support, and page fold effect on cover.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove page fold, reverse flip direction, add realistic page effects

- Removed page fold/arrow from cover page
- Reversed page direction: pages now flip to the LEFT \(forward = left\)
- Next pages come from the RIGHT side
- Added 3D rotation with rotateY during page turns
- Added dynamic shadow effects during flip transitions
- Added page edge shadows for realistic paper look
- Enhanced drag/swipe with perspective-based 3D transforms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
